channel.title: QEMU/KVM on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in QEMU/KVM on Memo

item.title: QEMU/KVM における EPT の操作
item.description: Initialize EPT # Add new entry # Update entry # Update state bits # __direct_map() --> mmu_set_spte() --> set_spte() --> mmu_spte_update() --> mmu_spte_update_no_track() static bool mmu_spte_update(u64 *sptep, u64 new_spte) { bool flush = false; u64 old_spte = mmu_spte_update_no_track(sptep, new_spte); if (!is_shadow_present_pte(old_spte)) return false; /* * For the spte updated out of mmu-lock is safe, since * we always atomically update it, see the comments in * spte_has_volatile_bits(). */ if (spte_can_locklessly_be_made_writable(old_spte) && !
